nasb.text: Then Jonathan said, “My father has troubled the land. See now, how my eyes have brightened because I tasted a little of this honey.

esv.text: Then Jonathan said, “My father has troubled the land. See how my eyes have become bright because I tasted a little of this honey.

cnv.text: 約拿單說：“我父親連累了這地的人。你們看！我嘗了這一點蜂蜜以後，我的眼睛就明亮了。

ccb.text: 约拿单说：“我父亲使大家受苦了。你看，我只吃了少许蜂蜜，就精神大振，
